title: Gold, silver prices today, April 19: Check 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver rate on Akshay Tritiya in Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru
summary: Gold prices in India remained stable on April 19, with 24-carat gold at  ₹154,900 per 10 grams. Akshaya Tritiya is considered auspicious for gold purchases.

title: Akshaya Tritiya 2026: After 63% rally, can gold prices reach  ₹2,00,000 next year
summary: As Akshaya Tritiya approaches on April 19, 2026, investors are focusing on gold for wealth creation. Gold prices has gained over 60% in the past year, driven by geopolitical uncertainties and strong demand, making it a reliable long-term investment option.

title: Stocks to buy or sell: Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec suggests buying Reliance, Power Grid Corp shares on April 20
summary: On April 17, Nifty 50 and Sensex rose for the second week, driven by lower oil prices and US-Iran talks. Nifty 50 increased by 0.65% to 24,353.55, while Sensex reached 78,493.54. Investor wealth grew by  ₹4.84 lakh crore, totaling  ₹4,65,64,461.51 crore.

title: Srinivas Narayanan, Kevin Weil, Bill Peebles: OpenAI lost 3 executives in one day as science division shuts down
summary: OpenAI lost Kevin Weil, Srinivas Narayanan and Bill Peebles in a single day as its science division was dissolved and Prism folded into Codex. Here's what happened.

title: Building wealth for your family is only half the job. The other half nobody does.
summary: Decades of disciplined investing can unravel overnight if families cannot locate accounts or understand succession rules. A Will and a simple financial map can prevent chaos.

title: Balanced advantage funds move in sync with markets—but not in the same way
summary: India’s top five BAFs in terms of investor assets cut and add equity through the cycle, but differences in models drive sharp variation in timing, range and conviction.

title: Akshay Tritiya 2026: 31% Indians feel cheated buying silver; 93% back mandatory hallmarking, reveal survey
summary: A survey reveals that 31% of consumers feel cheated when buying silver, with 93% supporting mandatory hallmarking to ensure purity and quality of silver products.
